feature.name: XML parse and unparse core
feature.description: Extract xmltodict SAX-to-ordered-dict parsing and dict-to-XML unparsing with namespace, attribute prefix, and mixed-content handling without importing xmltodict.
included_behaviors: parse XML strings into ordered dicts with @ attribute prefix
unparse dicts back to XML with matching attr_prefix and cdata_key
process_namespaces with optional namespace URI collapse map
mixed content via #text alongside child elements
excluded_behaviors: streaming item_depth callbacks and ParsingInterrupted control flow
postprocessor hooks and force_list / force_cdata selectors

entanglement.description: xmltodict couples expat SAX handler stack state, namespace declaration tracking, attribute prefix conventions, and symmetric unparse emission with validation.
signals: _DictSAXHandler path/stack tracks nested items and mixed content
namespace_declarations merged into @xmlns on element open
_process_namespace rewrites keys for unparse with URI maps
push_data promotes duplicate keys to lists and applies force_list

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import parse, unparse, ParsingInterrupted
